title: IIM Bangalore is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IIM Bangalore is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
IIM Bangalore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Bangalore:
IIM Bangalore is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Bangalore!
